Integrated real-time precise point
positioning system with B2b/B2a/B1C services
Zhetao Zhang1,2,3* , Hao Wang1,2,3 and Yuanxi Yang2,4
Abstract
Real-Time Precise Point Positioning (RTPPP) technology is one of the most important means of positioning and navi-
gation, whereas this type of service requires Internet access. As an alternative, satellite-based RTPPP can be utilized,
especially for the PPP-B2b service
